message:
fix(core): use active scope for indirect block reads in write_block_ptr

Five read_block_with_scope calls in the indirect write path used
RequestScope::empty() instead of the active transaction scope. This
meant freshly allocated zero-filled indirect blocks (staged via
tx.stage_write) would not be visible to subsequent reads within the
same write operation, causing stale/garbage data to be read instead.

Fixed all five sites (single-indirect RMW, double-indirect final write,
triple-indirect final write, ensure_pointer_in_block parent read) to
pass the active scope.

Also fixed ext4_mkdir block_dev immutability error from concurrent
agent's commit (c85dcf6) that reassigned a non-mut binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
